arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney takes aim at 'naive' Plymouth players as ex-Man Utd team-mate has last laugh
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney saw his Plymouth side lead three times against Middlesbrough before eventually drawing a six-goal thriller, which saw the Pilgrims slip to the bottom of the Championship

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford: Three clubs preparing everything to strike a deal
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks increasingly likely to leave Manchester United for the Saudi Pro League during the January transfer window. Three Saudi clubs are positioning themselves to sign the England international, with former Chelsea sporting director Michael Emenalo having been placed in charge of finding him a club.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Named 'Unbelievable' British Star as Toughest Opponent of his Career
arts.sum: These two have gone to battle over the years in some of the biggest games in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba transfer admission made amid Man Utd links - 'We will make space'
arts.sum: Paul Pogba is a man without a club after his Juventus contract was ripped up and Marseille are weighing up a swoop as Roberto De Zerbi talks up a move for the ex-Manchester United man

arts.ttl: 'Most important thing' - Matthijs de Ligt reiterates Ruben Amorim message to Man United teammates
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as Matthijs de Ligt provides insight into how the dressing room is adjusting to Ruben Amorim's coaching methods

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer new: Three clubs enter Rashford race
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has emerged as a key target for Saudi Arabian clubs Al-Ahli, Al-Ittihad, and Al-Qadsiah. And now the outlet has said that all three Saudi Pro League clubs are keen to sign Rashford, whether in January or during the summer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star shares first impressions of Leny Yoro after finally playing together
arts.sum: Leny Yoro was one of Manchester United's major signings back in the summer but injury put his debut on hold with Matthijs de Ligt now getting to see his class up close

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Bournemouth injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Manchester United and Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Graeme Souness slams Marcus Rashford for 'quietly accepting' Man Utd transfer exit
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Graeme Souness has laid into Marcus Rashford, claiming his career will go "downhill" if he does end up leaving Manchester United in the near future

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford swap deal option as £64m Man United transfer target becomes available
arts.sum: Manchester United and Paris Saint-Germain could entertain a potential swap deal during the January transfer window with Randal Kolo Muani now available
